snippet: Fascinating to watch the vector database trend unfold. Started as RAG-only tool, now vector search is in Postgres, Redis, MongoDB, and even SQLite. Ubiquity incoming.
author: fiona.bsky.social

snippet: Binary vector quantization is the most underrated trend in vector databases right now. 32x storage reduction with minimal accuracy loss. Pinecone and Weaviate both ship it now.
author: greg.bsky.social
